webcam_device_info_t(3) Library Functions Manual webcam_device_info_t(3)

NAME

webcam_device_info_t - Webcam device information structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/webcam/webcam.h>

Data Fields


unsigned int index
Device index (use with webcam_init). char name [256]
Human-readable device name.

Detailed Description

Webcam device information structure.

Contains information about an available webcam device. Used by device enumeration functions to return a list of available devices.

Note

Device index corresponds to the device_index parameter in webcam_init().

Definition at line 89 of file webcam.h.

Field Documentation

unsigned int webcam_device_info_t::index

Device index (use with webcam_init).

Definition at line 90 of file webcam.h.

char webcam_device_info_t::name[256]

Human-readable device name.

Definition at line 91 of file webcam.h.
